name: Speglar
short_description: Frantic 4-player laser ricocheting top-down shooter. Keep it casual and enjoy the chaos, or master the surprisingly deep mechanics to obliterate your enemies. Duke it out locally in free-for-all or 2v2.
detailed_description:
In the intergalactic sport of Speglar, pilots ricochet bullets using mirrors scattered throughout the arena to take out their opponents in chaotic yet competitive matches. When cornered, deploy your shield to reflect your enemies' bullets right back at them. Sit back and enjoy frantic and fun casual games, or deep-dive into the mechanics and become a true Speglar master!

Easy to learn, challenging to master

Originally designed for an arcade cabinet, Speglar has a simple control scheme with just two buttons: Shoot and Shield. Predict the bullet's ricochets to strike your opponents from afar, use the shield to cover your approach, and leverage timing and momentum to gain an edge over your opponents.

Up to 4 players locally

Outplay your opponent in intense one-on-ones, find a method to the madness in 4-player free-for-alls, or strategize with your teammate to clutch out the win in 2v2s.

Many ways to play

Mayhem mode: Each round has a new twist. Waves mode: Face a variety of enemies while going for the high score. Training mode: Hone your skills in a no-stakes playground.
